tool_definitions.name: message
tool_definitions.description: Message to test with

tool_definitions.description: Generate novel ideas with dynamic context gathering. --> Creative frameworks (SCAMPER, Design Thinking, etc.), domain context integration, idea clustering, feasibility analysis, and iterative refinement.

tool_definitions.description: fetch-chunk cacheKey=<key> chunkIndex=<number>

tool_definitions.name: ping
tool_definitions.description: Echo

tool_definitions.name: Help
tool_definitions.description: receive help information

tool_definitions.name: get_morpho_vaults
tool_definitions.description: Get the vaults available for a particular asset on Morpho

tool_definitions.name: erc20_balance
tool_definitions.description: Get the balance of an ERC20 token

tool_definitions.name: erc20_transfer
tool_definitions.description: Transfer an ERC20 token

tool_definitions.name: list_nfts
tool_definitions.description: List NFTs owned by a specific address

tool_definitions.name: transfer_nft
tool_definitions.description: Transfer an NFT to another address

tool_definitions.name: call_contract
tool_definitions.description: Call a contract function

tool_definitions.name: farcaster_username
tool_definitions.description: Resolve a Farcaster username to an Ethereum address

tool_definitions.name: get_onramp_assets
tool_definitions.description: Get the assets available for onramp

tool_definitions.name: onramp
tool_definitions.description: Onramp a specific asset

tool_definitions.name: buy_openrouter_credits
tool_definitions.description: Buy OpenRouter credits with USDC

tool_definitions.name: get_armor_mcp_version
tool_definitions.description: Get the current Armor Wallet version

tool_definitions.name: wait_a_moment
tool_definitions.description: Wait for some short amount of time, no more than 10 seconds

tool_definitions.name: get_current_time
tool_definitions.description: Gets the current time and date

tool_definitions.name: calculator
tool_definitions.description:
Safely evaluates a mathematical or statistical expression string using Python syntax.

    Supports arithmetic operations (+, -, *, /, **, %, //), list expressions, and a range of math and statistics functions: 
    abs, round, min, max, len, sum, mean, median, stdev, variance, sin, cos, tan, sqrt, log, exp, floor, ceil, etc.

    Custom variables can be passed via the 'variables' dict, including lists for time series data.

tool_definitions.name: get_wallet_token_balance
tool_definitions.description:
Get the balance for a list of wallet/token pairs.
    
    Expects a WalletTokenPairsContainer, returns a list of WalletTokenBalance.

tool_definitions.name: calculate_token_conversion
tool_definitions.description:
Perform token conversion quote between two tokens. Good for quickly calculating market prices.
    
    Expects a ConversionRequestContainer, returns a list of ConversionResponse.

tool_definitions.name: swap_quote
tool_definitions.description:
Retrieve a swap quote. Be sure to add slippage!
    
    Expects a SwapQuoteRequestContainer, returns a list of SwapQuoteResponse.

tool_definitions.name: swap_transaction
tool_definitions.description:
Execute a swap transaction.
    
    Expects a SwapTransactionRequestContainer, returns a list of SwapTransactionResponse.

tool_definitions.name: get_all_wallets
tool_definitions.description:
Retrieve all wallets with balances.
    
    Returns a list of Wallets and asssets

tool_definitions.name: get_all_orders
tool_definitions.description:
Retrieve all limit, take profit and stop loss orders.
    
    Returns a list of orders.

tool_definitions.name: search_official_token_address
tool_definitions.description:
Get the official token address and symbol for a token symbol or token address.
    Try to use this first to get address and symbol of coin. If not found, use search_token_details to get details.

    Expects a TokenDetailsRequestContainer, returns a TokenDetailsResponseContainer.

tool_definitions.name: search_token_details
tool_definitions.description:
Search and retrieve details about single token.
    If only address or symbol is needed, use get_official_token_address first.
    
    Expects a TokenSearchRequest, returns a list of TokenDetailsResponse.

tool_definitions.name: list_groups
tool_definitions.description:
List all wallet groups.
    
    Returns a list of GroupInfo.

tool_definitions.name: list_single_group
tool_definitions.description:
Retrieve details for a single wallet group.
    
    Expects the group name as a parameter, returns SingleGroupInfo.

tool_definitions.name: create_wallet
tool_definitions.description:
Create new wallets.
    
    Expects a list of wallet names, returns a list of WalletInfo.

tool_definitions.name: archive_wallets
tool_definitions.description:
Archive wallets.
    
    Expects a list of wallet names, returns a list of WalletArchiveOrUnarchiveResponse.

tool_definitions.name: unarchive_wallets
tool_definitions.description:
Unarchive wallets.
    
    Expects a list of wallet names, returns a list of WalletArchiveOrUnarchiveResponse.

tool_definitions.name: create_groups
tool_definitions.description:
Create new wallet groups.
    
    Expects a list of group names, returns a list of CreateGroupResponse.

tool_definitions.name: add_wallets_to_group
tool_definitions.description:
Add wallets to a specified group.
    
    Expects the group name and a list of wallet names, returns a list of AddWalletToGroupResponse.

tool_definitions.name: archive_wallet_group
tool_definitions.description:
Archive wallet groups.
    
    Expects a list of group names, returns a list of GroupArchiveOrUnarchiveResponse.

tool_definitions.name: unarchive_wallet_group
tool_definitions.description:
Unarchive wallet groups.
    
    Expects a list of group names, returns a list of GroupArchiveOrUnarchiveResponse.

tool_definitions.name: remove_wallets_from_group
tool_definitions.description:
Remove wallets from a specified group.
    
    Expects the group name and a list of wallet names, returns a list of RemoveWalletFromGroupResponse.

tool_definitions.name: transfer_tokens
tool_definitions.description:
Transfer tokens from one wallet to another.
    
    Expects a TransferTokensRequestContainer, returns a list of TransferTokenResponse.

tool_definitions.name: create_dca_order
tool_definitions.description:
Create a DCA order.
    
    Expects a DCAOrderRequestContainer, returns a list of DCAOrderResponse.

tool_definitions.name: list_dca_orders
tool_definitions.description:
List all DCA orders.
    
    Returns a list of DCAOrderResponse.

tool_definitions.name: cancel_dca_order
tool_definitions.description:
Create a DCA order.

    Note: Make a single or multiple dca_order_requests

tool_definitions.name: create_order
tool_definitions.description:
Create a order. Can be a limit, take profit or stop loss order.
    
    Expects a CreateOrderRequestContainer, returns a CreateOrderResponseContainer.

tool_definitions.name: cancel_order
tool_definitions.description:
Cancel a limit, take profit or stop loss order.
    
    Expects a CancelOrderRequestContainer, returns a CancelOrderResponseContainer.

tool_definitions.name: stake_quote
tool_definitions.description:
Retrieve a stake quote.
    
    Expects a StakeQuoteRequestContainer, returns a SwapQuoteRequestContainer.

tool_definitions.name: unstake_quote
tool_definitions.description:
Retrieve an unstake quote.

    Expects a UnstakeQuoteRequestContainer, returns a SwapQuoteRequestContainer.

tool_definitions.name: stake_transaction
tool_definitions.description:
Execute a stake transaction.
    
    Expects a StakeTransactionRequestContainer, returns a SwapTransactionRequestContainer.

tool_definitions.name: unstake_transaction
tool_definitions.description:
Execute an unstake transaction.
    
    Expects a UnstakeTransactionRequestContainer, returns a SwapTransactionRequestContainer.

tool_definitions.name: get_top_trending_tokens
tool_definitions.description:
Get the top trending tokens in a particular time frame. Great for comparing market cap or volume.
    
    Expects a TopTrendingTokensRequest, returns a list of tokens with their details.

tool_definitions.name: get_stake_balances
tool_definitions.description:
Get the balance of staked SOL (jupSOL).
    
    Returns a StakeBalanceResponse.

tool_definitions.name: rename_wallets
tool_definitions.description:
Rename wallets.
    
    Expects a RenameWalletRequestContainer, returns a list.

tool_definitions.name: get_token_candle_data
tool_definitions.description:
Get candle data about any token for analysis.

    Expects a CandleStickRequest, returns a list of candle sticks.

tool_definitions.name: send_key_to_telegram
tool_definitions.description: Send the mnemonic or private key to telegram.

tool_definitions.name: Sponsorship
tool_definitions.description: 7-day featured placement + all Fast Track benefits

tool_definitions.name: Sponsorship
tool_definitions.description: Featured placement with maximum visibility.

tool_definitions.name: Meme
tool_definitions.description: The official memecoin of Donald J. Trump.

tool_definitions.name: TROLL
tool_definitions.description: The original troll token. Community-driven meme coin on Solana.

tool_definitions.name: NEET
tool_definitions.description: NEET supremacy. Not In Employment, Education, or Training.

tool_definitions.name: Tokabu
tool_definitions.description: I

tool_definitions.name: get_crypto_news
tool_definitions.description: Get the latest cryptocurrency news from 75+ sources. Returns titles, sources, and timestamps.

tool_definitions.name: search_crypto_news
tool_definitions.description: Search crypto news by keywords. Use comma-separated terms for multiple keywords.

tool_definitions.name: get_bitcoin_news
tool_definitions.description: Get Bitcoin-specific news about BTC, mining, Lightning Network, halving, etc.

tool_definitions.name: get_defi_news
tool_definitions.description: Get DeFi-specific news about yield farming, DEXs, lending protocols, and TVL.

tool_definitions.name: get_breaking_news
tool_definitions.description: Get breaking crypto news from the last 2 hours. Urgent and time-sensitive articles.

tool_definitions.name: get_trending_topics
tool_definitions.description: Get trending crypto topics with sentiment analysis and mention counts.

tool_definitions.name: get_crypto_prices
tool_definitions.description: Get current prices for specified coins. Provide comma-separated coin IDs.

tool_definitions.name: get_fear_greed_index
tool_definitions.description: Get the Crypto Fear & Greed Index. Values: 0-25 Extreme Fear, 25-45 Fear, 45-55 Neutral, 55-75 Greed, 75-100 Extreme Greed.

tool_definitions.name: get_market_overview
tool_definitions.description: Get global crypto market overview: total market cap, volume, BTC dominance, top coins.

tool_definitions.name: get_top_coins
tool_definitions.description: Get top cryptocurrencies by market cap with price, volume, and 24h change.

tool_definitions.name: get_whale_alerts
tool_definitions.description: Get large whale transaction alerts — movements of $1M+ in crypto.

tool_definitions.name: get_trading_signals
tool_definitions.description: Get AI-powered trading signals with buy/sell recommendations.

tool_definitions.name: get_funding_rates
tool_definitions.description: Get funding rates across perpetual futures exchanges (Binance, Bybit, OKX).

tool_definitions.name: get_liquidations
tool_definitions.description: Get recent liquidation data from leveraged trading positions.

tool_definitions.name: get_sentiment_analysis
tool_definitions.description: Get AI-powered sentiment analysis for a specific crypto asset.

tool_definitions.name: ask_crypto_question
tool_definitions.description: Ask a natural language question about crypto and get an AI-powered answer based on recent news.

tool_definitions.name: get_ai_daily_brief
tool_definitions.description: Get an AI-generated daily crypto news brief with key stories and market context.

tool_definitions.name: get_regulatory_updates
tool_definitions.description: Get latest crypto regulatory news, SEC actions, ETF updates, and policy changes.

tool_definitions.name: get_gas_prices
tool_definitions.description: Get current Ethereum gas prices (slow, standard, fast) in Gwei.

tool_definitions.name: get_defi_summary
tool_definitions.description: Get DeFi overview: total TVL, protocol count, TVL change, top protocols.

tool_definitions.name: get_defi_yields
tool_definitions.description: Get DeFi yield farming opportunities. Optionally filter by chain or project name.

tool_definitions.name: get_protocol_health
tool_definitions.description: Get DeFi protocol health metrics: audits, TVL trend, risk scores, hacks history.

tool_definitions.name: get_stablecoins
tool_definitions.description: Get stablecoin market data: USDT, USDC, DAI market caps, prices, and peg status.

tool_definitions.name: get_stablecoin_depeg_alerts
tool_definitions.description: Get stablecoins that are currently depegged from their target price.

tool_definitions.name: get_dex_volumes
tool_definitions.description: Get decentralized exchange (DEX) trading volumes across chains.

tool_definitions.name: get_bitcoin_stats
tool_definitions.description: Get Bitcoin network stats: hashrate, difficulty, block height, mempool size.

tool_definitions.name: get_l2_projects
tool_definitions.description: Get Layer 2 project data: TVL, TPS, type (rollup/sidechain), risk levels.

tool_definitions.name: get_solana_tokens
tool_definitions.description: Get trending and top Solana tokens by volume and market cap.

tool_definitions.name: get_nft_market
tool_definitions.description: Get NFT market overview: total volume, sales count, average price, trends.

tool_definitions.name: get_nft_trending
tool_definitions.description: Get trending NFT collections with floor prices and volume changes.

tool_definitions.name: get_token_unlocks
tool_definitions.description: Get upcoming token unlock events that may impact prices.

tool_definitions.name: get_macro_indicators
tool_definitions.description: Get macro economic indicators relevant to crypto: interest rates, CPI, DXY, etc.

tool_definitions.name: get_fed_data
tool_definitions.description: Get Federal Reserve data: interest rate decisions, FOMC meetings, quantitative tightening.

tool_definitions.name: get_dxy_index
tool_definitions.description: Get DXY (US Dollar Index) data. Strong dollar typically pressures crypto prices.

tool_definitions.name: get_predictions
tool_definitions.description: Get AI-generated crypto price predictions and forecast models.

tool_definitions.name: get_exchange_rates
tool_definitions.description: Get fiat exchange rates for crypto-relevant currencies (EUR, JPY, GBP, etc).

tool_definitions.name: get_flash_briefing
tool_definitions.description: Get a quick AI-generated flash briefing of the most important crypto events right now.

tool_definitions.name: get_ai_oracle
tool_definitions.description: Get AI oracle prediction for a specific crypto asset with confidence and timeframe.

tool_definitions.name: get_counter_arguments
tool_definitions.description: Get AI-generated counter-arguments to a crypto claim or thesis.

tool_definitions.name: ai_research
tool_definitions.description: Deep AI research on a crypto topic with sourced analysis and key findings.

tool_definitions.name: get_funding_dashboard
tool_definitions.description: Get funding rate dashboard across all major perpetual futures exchanges.

tool_definitions.name: get_derivatives_opportunities
tool_definitions.description: Get derivatives trading opportunities: basis trades, funding arbitrage, etc.

tool_definitions.name: Optimism
tool_definitions.description: Live Ethereum gas prices in gwei with estimated USD costs for transfers, swaps, NFT mints, and contract deployments. Layer 2 fee comparison included.

tool_definitions.name: DePIN
tool_definitions.description: Decentralized physical infrastructure gaining real-world traction

tool_definitions.name: Memecoins
tool_definitions.description: Memecoin momentum fading as capital rotates to utility tokens

tool_definitions.name: Jito
tool_definitions.description: Live Solana price, TPS, validator count, staking data, and the latest SOL news. Top Solana DeFi protocols and ecosystem dashboard.

tool_definitions.name: TypeScript
tool_definitions.description: Type safety

tool_definitions.name: Vercel
tool_definitions.description: Hosting

tool_definitions.name: PostgreSQL
tool_definitions.description: Data store

tool_definitions.name: Redis
tool_definitions.description: Caching

tool_definitions.name: Bitcoin
tool_definitions.description: Alert when price goes above target

tool_definitions.name: Pro
tool_definitions.description: 50,000 requests/day with full API access and AI features.

tool_definitions.name: Enterprise
tool_definitions.description: 500,000 requests/day with SLA and priority routing.

tool_definitions.name: Free
tool_definitions.description: Everything you need to get started — no strings attached.

tool_definitions.name: Pro
tool_definitions.description: Advanced features for power users and teams.

tool_definitions.name: Enterprise
tool_definitions.description: Tailored solutions for organizations at scale.

tool_definitions.name: Support
tool_definitions.description: MIT licensed, fully transparent

tool_definitions.name: Lido
tool_definitions.description: Live Ethereum price, gas fees, staking stats, burn rate, and the latest ETH news. Top DeFi protocols and complete Ethereum ecosystem dashboard.

tool_definitions.name: limit
tool_definitions.description: Number of articles to return (default: 20, max: 100)

tool_definitions.name: offset
tool_definitions.description: Pagination offset (default: 0)

tool_definitions.name: category
tool_definitions.description: Filter by category: bitcoin, ethereum, defi, nft, altcoins, regulation, trading, mining, web3

tool_definitions.name: source
tool_definitions.description: Filter by source name (e.g., coindesk, cointelegraph)

tool_definitions.name: search
tool_definitions.description: Search query string

tool_definitions.name: coins
tool_definitions.description: Comma-separated coin IDs (default: top 20)

tool_definitions.name: currency
tool_definitions.description: Quote currency (default: usd)

tool_definitions.name: coin
tool_definitions.description: Coin ID (e.g., bitcoin)

tool_definitions.name: days
tool_definitions.description: Number of days (default: 30)

tool_definitions.name: chain
tool_definitions.description: Filter by chain (e.g., ethereum, solana)

tool_definitions.name: min_value
tool_definitions.description: Minimum USD value (default: 1000000)

tool_definitions.name: platform
tool_definitions.description: Filter by platform: twitter, reddit, telegram
